series_metadata.series_description: Pleadings and correspondence files for litigation matters in which the OTC is a party.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 2 years after case closed or deadline by which an appeal may be filed. ; Paper: Retain 2 years after case is closed or deadline by which an appeal may be filed. Paper copies can be disposed prior to the 2 years or deadline by which an appeal may be filed if and only if electronic copies are available., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Trash
